hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE '^[[:space:]]*pip[0-9]?([[:space:]]|$)' || exit 0; echo 'This project uses uv, not pip. Use `task add -- <pkg>` (or `task add-dev -- <pkg>`) instead.' >&2; echo '{"systemMessage":"❌ Blocked pip command — this project uses uv (task add)"}'; exit 2
hooks.statusMessage: Blocking pip — this project uses uv (task add)

hooks.command: jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | endswith(".py")' >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; task check >&2 || exit 2; echo '{"systemMessage":"✓ task check passed (format/lint/typecheck)"}'

hooks.statusMessage: Checking Taskfile is in sync with README.md and CLAUDE.md
